external_checks.external_finding: WinDrawWin/thestatsdontlie report ~52-54% BTTS this season (37 games in, one source put it at 20/37=54%).
external_checks.note: Stored 51.8% is within normal source-to-source variance of the external 52-54% range.

external_checks.query: Brazil Serie A 2025 season goals per game / BTTS
external_checks.external_finding: soccerstats.com reports 177 of 380 matches played (exact match on n) and 2.52 avg goals/game.
external_checks.note: Match count (n=177) confirmed exactly by an independent source. avg_goals 2.66 vs external 2.52 is a ~5% gap, within plausible cutoff-date/source variance -- not flagged.

external_checks.query: Algeria Ligue 1 2024-25 season champion results table
external_checks.external_finding: footballdatabase/tribuna confirm the 2024/25 Algerian Ligue 1 season was 100% completed: 240 of 240 matches played (16 teams, full double round-robin), champion MC Alger.
external_checks.verdict: INCOMPLETE -- NOT falsified, but our dataset only has 144 of the season's 240 matches (60%).
external_checks.note: This is a genuine finding, not a false-data case: ALG1's BTTS/calibration numbers are based on a partial-season sample. Needs a follow-up re-ingestion from openfootball to pull the full 240-match season before this league's numbers should be fully trusted. Flagged for Vincent, not auto-corrected.
